title: Does anyone have the original Rebuild 111 trailer
display_title: Does anyone have the original Rebuild 111 trailer
wikitext:
[]: Does anyone have the original Rebuild 1.11 trailer?             Quote Post by Gryphus_OnE » Mon Oct 03, 2016 8:13 am This is a strange request because its not actually an item. I remember watching the original trailer to Rebuild 1.11 on YouTube back in 2008, it featured the entirety of Utada Hikaru's Beautiful World and several scenes from the movie at over five minutes long. It seems that the first trailer has been completely removed from the internet (copyright?) because I can't find it anywhere and the current AMV on YouTube is only slightly over half the length of the original (and is not a trailer). I was wondering if there was any good Samaritan here that had downloaded the video or knows where I can still find the original trailer to Rebuild 1.11.

[]: Re: Does anyone have the original Rebuild 1.11 trailer?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Oct 03, 2016 12:54 pm I wanna say that it's on the first print of Funimation's 1.11 DVD, but Funi goofed with some of the special features on the discs and had to remove a lot of them in subsequent printings for licensing reasons. I'm not sure if the music video was one of the extras that was axed.

[]: Re: Does anyone have the original Rebuild 1.11 trailer?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Oct 03, 2016 1:26 pm Of course, then there's the ORIGINAL Rebuild of Evangelion teaser from 9 years ago. They didn't stick to their projected schedule, lol. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1uH1mZWTCds

[]: Re: Does anyone have the original Rebuild 1.11 trailer?             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Oct 12, 2016 11:10 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I wanna say that it's on the first print of Funimation's 1.11 DVD, but Funi goofed with some of the special features on the discs and had to remove a lot of them in subsequent printings for licensing reasons. I'm not sure if the music video was one of the extras that was axed.
